title: botrychium biforme
intro: Botrychium biforme, also known as the two-leaved grape fern, is a rare and unique species of plant that belongs to the genus Ophioglossum and is part of the Ophioglossaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Botrychium biforme are said to include the treatment of various health issues such as arthritis, skin problems, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Botrychium biforme include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
